projectDescription: Distributed, git-backed graph issue tracker for AI coding agents with Dolt-powered version control
keyFeatures: Dolt-powered version-controlled SQL database with cell-level merge
Hash-based collision-free IDs for multi-agent workflows
Dependency-aware graph tracking (blocks, relates_to, parent-child, discovered-from)
Agent-optimized JSON output and auto-ready task detection
Memory compaction with semantic decay for context window optimization
Multi-writer access via RPC layer for concurrent operations
Git integration with automatic hooks for sync workflows
Stealth and contributor modes for flexible collaboration
Messaging system with threading and ephemeral lifecycle
Native branching and sync via Dolt remotes
publicApiSurface: bd init - Initialize beads repository
bd create - Create issues with dependencies and labels
bd update - Update issue fields and metadata
bd show - View issue details and audit trail
bd list - List issues with filtering
bd ready - Find unblocked work ready to start
bd blocked - Show blocked issues and dependencies
bd close - Mark issues as completed
bd dep - Manage dependencies (add, remove, tree)
bd label - Manage issue labels
bd dolt - Dolt operations (push, pull, commit, branch)
bd sync - Synchronize with remote
bd compact - Run memory compaction
bd doctor - Health checks and repairs
bd hooks - Git hook management
bd export - Export to JSONL
bd import - Import from JSONL or external trackers
bd graph - Visualize dependency graphs
bd search - Full-text search across issues
bd stale - Find stale issues
